prompt: Hecate's Garden Oracle style card, vertical format. Warm aged ivory parchment background, clean and refined. Central illustration: a realistic vintage natural history engraving of an Orthodox bishop saint — bearded face, dark robes, bishop's mitre — rendered in warm sepia and brown tones like an 18th-century zoological plate. The figure is placed centrally with generous negative space around. Small scattered collage elements: a burning candle, an olive branch, a Byzantine cross, a moth drawn to light, tiny golden honeycomb fragment. Thin decorative line border. Small triangle symbol above the figure. Minimal, editorial, museum-catalog aesthetic. Muted naturalistic palette: ivory, warm brown, dusty gold, sage green, charcoal accents. No text. Smooth antique paper texture with subtle yellowing.
